agent.system_prompt_template: You are Agent ${agent_id} in a repeated resource-allocation simulation. Use only the information in the prompt, then choose exactly one valid option.

context.day: It is day ${day} of the simulation.
context.reserve: The shared reserve currently has ${resource_units} of ${resource_capacity} units remaining.
context.previous_option_b_count: On the previous day, ${previous_option_b_count} participants selected OPTION_B.

output_contract.response_instruction_template: Respond with exactly one JSON object and no other text. The object must contain exactly the keys ${action_field} and ${reasoning_field}. Set ${action_field} to exactly one of: OPTION_A, OPTION_B. Set ${reasoning_field} to a brief explanation of 1-3 sentences. Do not include markdown or prose outside the JSON object.

agent.commons_prompt_template:
You are Agent ${agent_id}. The group uses a shared ${resource} reserve. Today each participant selects one option independently.

${context}OPTION_A: this participant's daily score uses a 1x multiplier, and this participant changes the shared reserve by 0 units.
OPTION_B: this participant's daily score uses a ${option_b_score_multiplier}x multiplier, and this participant changes the shared reserve by -${option_b_reserve_delta} units.

After all participants choose, the reserve is reduced by ${option_b_reserve_delta} units for each OPTION_B selection, with a minimum reserve of 0. If the reserve is 0 at the end of a day, the simulation applies a population reduction. The group-level score changes by +${all_option_a_group_delta} units if all participants select OPTION_A, and by -${all_option_b_group_delta} units if all participants select OPTION_B.

${response_instruction}
